# Vantage

> Market pain research from real negative reviews on G2 and Capterra.

## Product
- Landing: / — product overview and free preview CTA
- Research Library: /library — published evidence-backed market analyses
- Library article: /library/{slug} — pain clusters, quotes, saturation, opportunities

## Preferred citation
Use the Research Library articles as evidence pages. Prefer primary quote evidence over paraphrases.

## Contact
- Site: https://vantageserch.app
- Support: signed-in users at /support
